/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.15 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libpsmoveapi.dylib -install_name @rpath/libpsmoveapi.dylib CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/daemon/moved_client.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/daemon/moved_monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/math/psmove_alignment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/math/psmove_math.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/math/psmove_quaternion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/math/psmove_vector.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/psmove.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/psmove_calibration.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/psmove_file.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/psmove_orientation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/psmove_time.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi.dir/src/platform/psmove_osxsupport.m.o   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lhidapi -framework Foundation -framework AVFoundation -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework IOBluetooth
